samples.text: All trees are plants. An oak is a tree. Therefore, is an oak a plant?
Every tree belongs to the category of plants. An oak is classified as a tree. Does this mean an oak is a plant?
All woody plants are plants. An oak tree is a woody plant. Therefore, is an oak tree a plant?
An oak belongs to the group of trees. The group of trees falls under plants. Based on this, is an oak a plant?
All trees are plants. An oak is a tree. The room temperature is 22 degrees Celsius. Therefore, is an oak a plant?
